functions.test_requirement: Cover partner list and partner detail retrieval through the matching endpoint, including role-specific search terms, exclusion of already-associated users, returned profile detail, and missing-request handling.

preconditions: The request contains tech preferences React, NestJS and an INDUSTRY answer FinTech
Broker broker-1 already has a proposal on request-2
returns: Builds broker search terms that include React, NestJS, and FinTech
Excludes broker-1 from the broker candidate search
Returns the ranked partner list with candidateProfile detail such as companyName, domains, and portfolioLinks

preconditions: The request contains tech preferences React, NestJS and an INDUSTRY answer FinTech
Freelancer freelancer-1 already has a proposal on request-1
returns: Builds freelancer search terms from technical fields only
Excludes FinTech from the freelancer search terms
Excludes freelancer-1 from the freelancer candidate search

preconditions: The caller omits role, enableAi, and topN query parameters
